languages.original_text: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious Rogue Trader, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

languages.text: "Достаточно". {n}Тразин щелкает пальцами — и Себериан фон Валанциус, легенда рода и прославленный {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g}, исчезает, покорный неведомым ксенотехнологиям. Багряная пляска Кхейна меркнет вместе с хозяином — чтобы через мгновение появиться у вас в руках.{/n}
languages.translation_comment:
Тразин щелкает пальцами и предок исчезает
ВЫДАТЬ МЕЧ КРИВОРУКОГО В ЯРОСТИ

traits.locale_text: "Достаточно". {n}Тразин щелкает пальцами — и Себериан фон Валанциус, легенда рода и прославленный {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Вольный Торговец{/g}, исчезает, покорный неведомым ксенотехнологиям. Багряная пляска Кхейна меркнет вместе с хозяином — чтобы через мгновение появиться у вас в руках.{/n}
traits.speaker: Trazyn_Eternal_Boss

ВЫДАТЬ МЕЧ КРИВОРУКОГО В ЯРОСТИ

The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

"Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

languages.text: «Basta». {n}Trazyn chasquea los dedos y Seberian von Valancius, leyenda de la dinastía e ilustre {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}, se desvanece subyugado por una xenotecnología desconocida. La Danza Carmesí de Khaine desaparece junto a su amo solo para reaparecer en tus manos un momento más tarde.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Basta». {n}Trazyn chasquea los dedos y Seberian von Valancius, leyenda de la dinastía e ilustre {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Comerciante Independiente{/g}, se desvanece subyugado por una xenotecnología desconocida. La Danza Carmesí de Khaine desaparece junto a su amo solo para reaparecer en tus manos un momento más tarde.{/n}

languages.text: “够了。”{n}特拉金打了个响指，王朝的传奇人物、显赫的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，便在未知的异形科技的控制下瞬间消散。连同其主人一并消失的凯恩的猩红之舞，却在下一刻重新出现在你手中。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “够了。”{n}特拉金打了个响指，王朝的传奇人物、显赫的{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}行商浪人{/g}塞贝里安·冯·瓦兰修斯，便在未知的异形科技的控制下瞬间消散。连同其主人一并消失的凯恩的猩红之舞，却在下一刻重新出现在你手中。{/n}

languages.text: « Ça suffit. » {n}Trazyn claque des doigts et Seberian von Valancius, légendaire {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} de la dynastie, se volatilise, emporté par une xénotechnologie inconnue. La Danse écarlate de Khaine disparaît avec son maître, puis se matérialise à nouveau entre vos mains un instant plus tard.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ça suffit. » {n}Trazyn claque des doigts et Seberian von Valancius, légendaire {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}libre-marchand{/g} de la dynastie, se volatilise, emporté par une xénotechnologie inconnue. La Danse écarlate de Khaine disparaît avec son maître, puis se matérialise à nouveau entre vos mains un instant plus tard.{/n}

languages.text: "Yeter." {n}Trazyn'in parmaklarını şıklatmasıyla hanedanlığın efsanesi olan ünlü {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} Seberian von Valancius, bilinmeyen zeno teknolojisinin esiri olarak yok olup gidiyor. Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı, efendisiyle birlikte kaybolsa da bir an sonra senin ellerinde yeniden beliriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yeter." {n}Trazyn'in parmaklarını şıklatmasıyla hanedanlığın efsanesi olan ünlü {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Hür Tacir{/g} Seberian von Valancius, bilinmeyen zeno teknolojisinin esiri olarak yok olup gidiyor. Khaine'in Kızıl Dansı, efendisiyle birlikte kaybolsa da bir an sonra senin ellerinde yeniden beliriyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Genug." {n}Trazyn knackt mit den Fingern und Seberian von Valancius, Legende der Dynastie und gefeierter {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}, verschwindet als Sklave einer unbekannten Xenotechnologie. Blutroter Tanz von Khaine verschwindet mit seinem Meister und taucht einen Moment später in deinen Händen wieder auf.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Genug." {n}Trazyn knackt mit den Fingern und Seberian von Valancius, Legende der Dynastie und gefeierter {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Freihändler{/g}, verschwindet als Sklave einer unbekannten Xenotechnologie. Blutroter Tanz von Khaine verschwindet mit seinem Meister und taucht einen Moment später in deinen Händen wieder auf.{/n}

languages.text: 「十分だ」{n}トラズンが指を鳴らすと、ヴァランシウス家の伝説であり、名高い{g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}ローグ・トレーダー{/g}であるシベリア・フォン・ヴァランシウスが、未知の異星技術に支配され姿を消す。カイヌの血染めの舞踏もその主人と共に消え、その直後にあなたの手に現れる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Enough." {n}Trazyn clicks his fingers, and Seberian von Valancius, legend of the dynasty and illustrious {g|Encyclopedia:RogueTraderGlossary}Rogue Trader{/g}, vanishes, in thrall to unknown xenotechnology. The Crimson Dance of Khaine disappears along with its master, only to reappear in your hands a moment later.{/n}
